help.description: Get information about a specific command.

command.description: The command you want to know more about.

list.description: Displays a paginated list of items.

user.description: The user you want to like.

ban.description: Bans a member from the server.

bookmark.description: Bookmarks a message by sending it to your DMs.

show-avatar.description: Displays the avatar of a user.

mod_actions.kick_success: Simulating kick action for user ID: {{userid}}
mod_actions.ban_success: Simulating ban action for user ID: {{userid}}
mod_actions.timeout_success: Simulating timeout action for user ID: {{userid}}

like.reply_content: {{author}} wants to show their appreciation for {{target}}!

like_component.like_self: You cannot like yourself through this button!

bookmark.dm_success: I have sent the bookmarked message to your DMs! 🔖
bookmark.dm_error: I couldn't send you a DM. Please check your privacy settings.

common_errors.generic: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.
common_errors.cooldown: ⏳ Please wait before using {{command}} again. You can reuse it {{time}}.
common_errors.guild_only: This command can only be used in a server.
common_errors.missing_permissions: You are missing the required permissions for this command: `{{permissions}}`
common_errors.paginator_expired: This is not for you or has expired!
